title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at CDSL

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at CDSL
jsonLd.description:
We at CDSL are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About CDSL:
CDSL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDSL!
